---
title: "Wesley T. Morris"
page-layout: full
resources:
    - headshot.png
    - Morris_CV.pdf
    - CNAME
---

<div class="home-hero">

<div class="home-sidebar">
<img src="headshot.png" class="home-photo" alt="Wesley T. Morris">
<div class="home-links">
<div><a href="Morris_CV.pdf" class="about-link"><i class="bi bi-file-text"></i> CV</a></div>
<div><a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=ktYcC8MAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&authuser=5&gmla=AH70aAWVyVJkXi7NWJQBqNzgLmUIHMp1BeJhLZbRPnf2S7CC718HviNud1FttDOMRthIlc1Uk9nKmh6UqikZp6jzrJmJ3KDwsfBwqg" class="about-link"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Google Scholar</a></div>
<div><a href="mailto:wtmorris@umd.edu" class="about-link"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a></div>
<div><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/wesleytmorris/" class="about-link"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a></div>
<div><a href="https://bsky.app/profile/wesleytmorris.bsky.social" class="about-link">Bluesky</a></div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="home-content">
<h1 class="home-name">Wesley T. Morris</h1>
<p class="home-subtitle">Postdoctoral Research Fellow<br>Department of Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership<br>College of Education<br>University of Maryland, College Park</p>

## About Me

Wesley Morris is a Postdoctoral Research Fellow in Education Policy at the University of Maryland, College Park. His research examines the early career teacher pipeline, with particular attention to how education policies influence teacher labor markets and affect teacher quality. He is especially interested in rural schools, where he explores how well-intentioned reforms can lead to unintended consequences and how more deliberate policy design can better meet the needs of students, educators, and local leaders. Wesley is committed to bridging the divide between research, policy, and practice, and works closely with policymakers and practitioners to ensure his research is both informed by their experience and applicable to the complex decisions they navigate every day.
</div>

<div class="home-news">

## In the News

<div class="home-news-cards">

::: {.news-card}
::: {.news-outlet}
National Council on Teacher Quality
:::
::: {.news-headline}
[TEACH Grants Work, Just Not Alone](https://www.nctq.org/research-insights/teach-grants-work-just-not-alone/)
:::
::: {.news-date}
February 2026
:::
:::

::: {.news-card}
::: {.news-outlet}
Brookings Institution
:::
::: {.news-headline}
[Hutchins Roundup: Technology Adoption, Online Education, and More](https://www.brookings.edu/articles/hutchins-roundup-technology-adoption-online-education-and-more/)
:::
::: {.news-date}
November 2022
:::
:::

::: {.news-card}
::: {.news-outlet}
UNC School of Education
:::
::: {.news-headline}
[Wesley Morris Named a UNC Community Engagement Fellow](https://ed.unc.edu/2022/02/28/doctoral-students-wesley-morris-william-zahran-named-community-engagement-fellows/)
:::
::: {.news-date}
February 2022
:::
:::

</div>

</div>

</div>
